response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his recent work is primarily in TypeScript/Node.js — missing key required skills for this role despite relevant domain exposure.
strengths: Built and maintained open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages quickly
Strong background in distributed systems, CI/CD, and low-latency application development
concerns: No evidence of commercial C++ or Rust development in routing, navigation, or geospatial tiling
Recent roles focus on web/TypeScript stacks, not systems-level data pipelines or map tile optimization
Lacks explicit experience with routing data freshness, traffic signal integration, or navigation QA
